film.title: Kis Kisko Pyaar Karoon
film.overview: A comedy or errors, wherein a married man attempts to juggle his three wives along with his current girlfriend.

dialogues.dialogue: Deepu! Deepu! Hey sweetie...Sweetheart...Baby! - Uncle...Uncle, at this age you are teasing a girl? Don't you have any shame? Come here. She is my daughter.
dialogues.cause_raw: Inappropriate behavior towards a young girl

dialogues.dialogue: Mother... - Yes or no. Yes. Shameless! You are already married three times...And you were about to get married for the fourth time! Why didn't you just die before doing such a shameful deed?

Shameless! You are already married three times...And you were about to get married for the fourth time! Why didn't you just die before doing such a shameful deed? I wouldn't be as sad on your death as I am now. You ruined the lives of four girls.
